page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.r8a.8xlarge is a memory-optimized virtual machine instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 32 dedicated physical cores on an x86_64 architecture, utilizing the AMD EPYC 9T24 processor running at a base clock speed of 2.7 GHz. The instance is configured with 256.0 GB of RAM, providing a high memory-to-vCPU ratio of 8.0 GB per core. It does not include local storage or GPU accelerators, relying instead on network-attached storage and a baseline network bandwidth of 10 Gbps.

Performance benchmarks indicate strong single-core CPU capabilities, with stress-ng single-core testing placing it in the top 25% of its class. Multi-core CPU performance and memory bandwidth benchmarks fall within the average range, with large-block read and write memory bandwidths measured at 75.61 GB/sec and 56.11 GB/sec respectively. Single-threaded gzip compression achieves 29.13 GB/sec, while multi-threaded bzip3 decompression reaches 174.65 GB/sec. The processor supports advanced instruction sets including AVX-512, AVX512_VNNI, and AVX512_BF16, which accelerate vector and neural network processing workloads.

Given its high memory density and dedicated AMD EPYC cores, this instance offers a cost-efficient profile for memory-bound workloads that do not require local NVMe storage or hardware GPU acceleration. The absence of bundled local storage means storage costs are decoupled, allowing users to scale block storage independently. This configuration is highly suitable for large-scale databases, in-memory caching systems, enterprise applications, and data processing pipelines that require substantial memory capacity relative to compute resources.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.r8a.8xlarge is a memory-optimized instance featuring 32 dedicated physical cores powered by an AMD EPYC 9T24 processor running at 2.7 GHz. Built on the x86_64 architecture and managed via the KVM hypervisor, this instance provides 256.0 GB of RAM, establishing a high 8.0 GB per core memory-to-CPU ratio. It lacks local storage and GPU accelerators, but delivers a baseline network bandwidth of 10 Gbps. Benchmark data highlights strong single-core CPU performance alongside average multi-core and memory bandwidth capabilities. The processor supports advanced vector extensions such as AVX-512 and AVX512_VNNI. This instance is well-suited for memory-intensive workloads, including in-memory databases, caching layers, and enterprise applications requiring substantial RAM without the need for local physical disks.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.r8a.8xlarge is a memory-optimized instance with 32 dedicated AMD EPYC cores, 256 GB RAM, and 10 Gbps network bandwidth, designed for memory-intensive enterprise workloads.

tagline: A memory-optimized virtual server featuring dedicated AMD EPYC processors and 256 GB of RAM for memory-intensive enterprise workloads.
bullet_points: 32 dedicated AMD EPYC 9T24 physical cores running at 2.7 GHz
256.0 GB of system memory providing 8.0 GB per core
10 Gbps baseline network bandwidth with KVM virtualization
Strong single-core performance with AVX-512 instruction support
No local storage or GPU accelerators included
Best suited for in-memory databases, caching, and enterprise applications
